examples: Large Dragons, 1ca, imperforate horizontal pair, with top right corner margins, rare, VF-F.
C94 Stage Art of Mei Lanfang, imperforate stamps in horizontal pairs, all with corner wide margins, rare, OG, VF.
Among them, 17 were combining type, 9 imperforate anus associated with intestinal neuronal dysplasia, 3 immaturity of ganglion cells, 1 hypoganglionosis, 2 neuronal hypogenesis.
